name: io.github.nirholas/three.ws
description: Render 3D avatars from three.ws as interactive embeds or real PNG/JPEG/WebP images, get copy-paste <iframe> embed code for any avatar, on-chain agent, or Forge creation to drop into Notion/Webflow/a blog, persist and manage your avatar library, validate, inspect, and optimize glTF/GLB models, give agents persistent memory (remember, recall, forget), and mint an agent's on-chain identity — register_agent (server-custodial Metaplex Agent Registry on Solana, or a prepared ERC-8004 payload for Base) and identity_check (Granite impersonation + policy screening).
